title: calceolaria nevadensis subsp. meridensis
intro: Calceolaria nevadensis subsp. meridensis, commonly known as the Andean slipper orchid, is a plant species belonging to the Calceolaria genus. The plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues, including respiratory problems and inflammation, due to its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits associated with Calceolaria nevadensis subsp. meridensis include reducing inflammation, alleviating coughs and colds, and providing antioxidant protection. Calceolaria nevadensis subsp. meridensis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
